name: arsenal-router
description: Smart prompt router for Claude Code — auto-classifies tasks as Vanilla (direct), Scout (research), or Arsenal (full power) to optimize token usage and maximize productivity
author: Muhammad Talha Javed <talha@aivico.app>

claude-plugin.name: arsenal-router
claude-plugin.description: Auto-classifies prompts → Vanilla / Scout / Arsenal mode to optimize token usage
